use_codes.desc: USE BY FEMALES OF REPRODUCTIVE POTENTIAL TO PREVENT PREGNANCY

indications.text:
NEXTSTELLIS is indicated for use by females of reproductive potential to prevent pregnancy.
Limitations of Use
NEXTSTELLIS may be less effective in females with a BMI ≥ 30 kg/m2. In females with BMI ≥ 30
kg/m2, decreasing effectiveness may be associated with increasing BMI [see Clinical Studies
(14)...
